summary: Completed testing of highway direction indicators, exit signs, curve warnings, speed limit signs, and traffic slowdown markers. All new sign types are properly implemented with counter-rotate CSS class for upright display during map rotation. Backend road-shield endpoint continues to work correctly (10/10 tests pass). Frontend successfully places all sign markers after route calculation.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 926 - placeHighwayShields() includes direction badge with N/S/E/W arrow and gold circle
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 978-1001 - placeExitSigns() creates green exit sign markers with data-testid='exit-sign-marker'
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 1003-1027 - placeCurveSigns() creates yellow diamond curve warning markers with data-testid='curve-sign-marker'
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 1029-1049 - placeSpeedLimitSigns() creates white speed limit sign markers with data-testid='speed-limit-sign-marker'
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 1051-1077 - placeTrafficSlowdowns() creates red/orange traffic slowdown markers with data-testid='traffic-slowdown-marker'
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 2680-2688 - Exit signs extracted from section.actions when action='exit' or instruction contains 'take exit'
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 2690-2698 - Curve signs extracted when direction contains 'sharpleft' or 'sharpright'
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 2866-2878 - Speed limit signs placed at speed limit transition points from spans
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 2880-2894 - Traffic slowdowns extracted from span.incidents for CONGESTION, CONSTRUCTION, etc.
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 3230-3248 - All placement functions called after route is drawn
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 2306-2308 - clearRoute() properly clears shieldLayerGroupRef.current.clearLayers()
VERIFIED: index.css line 44-47 - .counter-rotate CSS class uses 'rotate: calc(var(--map-rotation, 0deg) * -1)' for upright signs
VERIFIED: All sign marker HTML includes class='counter-rotate' wrapper div
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new sign features implemented and tested. Route from Council Bluffs, IA to Denver, CO produces: 25 highway shields (with direction badges), 4 exit signs, 0 curve signs (expected - I-80 is straight), 4 speed limit signs, 0 traffic slowdowns (no current incidents). All signs use counter-rotate CSS class for upright display. Backend road-shield endpoint unchanged and working.

highway_shield_direction_badges.details: Direction badges (N/S/E/W arrows in gold circles) added to highway shield markers. Verified in placeHighwayShields() function with dirArrows and dirLabel mappings.

exit_sign_markers.details: Found 4 exit sign markers with data-testid='exit-sign-marker' on Denver route. Green background with EXIT label and road name.

curve_warning_signs.details: 0 curve signs found - expected for I-80 which is a straight interstate. Code verified to extract sharp curves from section.actions direction field.

speed_limit_change_signs.details: Found 4 speed limit sign markers with data-testid='speed-limit-sign-marker'. White background with SPEED LIMIT text and MPH value.

traffic_slowdown_markers.details: 0 traffic slowdown markers found - expected when no current traffic incidents on route. Code verified to extract from span.incidents.

counter_rotate_css_class.details: 102+ elements with .counter-rotate class found. CSS rule verified: 'rotate: calc(var(--map-rotation, 0deg) * -1)' for upright signs during map rotation.

backend_road_shield_endpoint.details: 10/10 pytest tests pass. Returns valid PNG images for interstate, US highway, and state route shields.

shields_cleared_on_route_cancel.details: clearRoute() function at line 2306-2308 calls shieldLayerGroupRef.current.clearLayers() to clear all sign markers.

app_loads_correctly.details: App loads with splash screen, then login page

guest_login_works.details: Continue as Guest button works, navigates to Command Center

navigation_page_loads_with_map.details: Navigation view shows map with satellite imagery, search input, and controls

route_calculation_works.details: Route from Council Bluffs to Denver calculated successfully: 545.9 mi, 7h 35m
